An '''operation''' was carried out by the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] to prevent the discovery of their [[Echo Base/Legends|base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Background==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a space outpost in the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]], a region near Hoth. Since [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence was dangerously close, a portion of the Rebel Alliance Fleet, led by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], led a raid against the outpost.

==The battle==
The [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] [[Aggressor (Acclamator-class)|''Aggressor'']] and the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Bombard]]'' fell to concentrated fire from [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigates]]. All fire was then concentrated on the main space station and the outpost was destroyed.

==Aftermath==
The fall of the Imperial outpost ensured the safety of Echo Base, and an Alliance outpost was established in the asteroid field, which was later destroyed in the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards]]. Vergesso being under Alliance control allowed a [[Attack on a Tatooine Imperial base|raid]] on an Imperial outpost on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
